Sec. 1  
In 2019, the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh was Chandrababu Naidu. He belonged to the Telugu Desam Party. His tenure was marked by several development initiatives.

Sec. 2  
Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister 2019  
***  
Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister 2019 - Chandrababu Naidu - ruled the state - from 2014 to 2019 - with a clear mandate - from the voters.  
***  
Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister 2019 - faced challenges - in governance - and development - but maintained - a strong political base.  
***  
Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister 2019 - focused on - infrastructure projects - and industrial growth - to boost - the state's economy.  

Sec. 3  
Chandrababu Naidu's leadership was pivotal in shaping the state's policies during that period. He was known for his pragmatic approach to governance. His tenure ended with the 2019 elections, which saw a change in government.
